name: peaka-mcp-server
description: MCP server for querying Peaka data using natural language and SQL

PEAKA_API_KEY.title: Peaka API Key
PEAKA_API_KEY.description: Your Peaka API key. Accepts both Partner API keys (multi-project) and Project API keys (single-project).

tools.name: peaka_list_projects
tools.description: List all projects accessible with the current API key. For Partner API keys, enumerates projects across all organizations and workspaces. For Project API keys, returns the single project bound to the key. Use this to discover projectIds, then pass the chosen projectId to subsequent tool calls.

tools.name: peaka_get_project_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for all catalogs, schemas, and tables in a Peaka project in a single call. Optionally filter by catalogId and/or schemaName. Requires projectId. Use this tool to discover the data structure before writing queries.

tools.name: peaka_query_golden_sqls
tools.description: Query question/SQL pairs from Peaka's golden SQL vector store. Requires projectId. If you find an existing query matching the user's question, just use it. Otherwise use the other tools to figure out the tables and write the query.

tools.name: peaka_execute_sql_query
tools.description: Runs the given SQL query on Peaka. Requires projectId. Before running, use peaka_get_project_metadata to determine tables and schemas. If tables are cacheable but not cached, warn the user and offer to start caching.

tools.name: peaka_list_queries
tools.description: List all saved queries in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Returns query names, SQL content, and whether they are plain or materialized.

tools.name: peaka_execute_query
tools.description: Execute a saved query by its ID in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Use peaka_list_queries to find available query IDs.

tools.name: peaka_create_query
tools.description: Create a named, saved query in a Peaka project's semantic layer. Requires projectId. Returns the created query object including its ID.

tools.name: peaka_update_query
tools.description: Update an existing saved query's display name and/or SQL body. Requires projectId. Use peaka_list_queries to find available query IDs.

tools.name: peaka_delete_query
tools.description: Delete a saved query from a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Use peaka_list_queries to find available query IDs.

tools.name: peaka_refresh_materialized_query
tools.description: Trigger a refresh on a materialized saved query in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Use peaka_list_queries to find query IDs whose queryType is MATERIALIZED.

tools.name: peaka_create_cache
tools.description: Create a cache for a table in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Caching a table improves query performance by storing the data locally.

tools.name: peaka_create_cache_batch
tools.description: Create caches for multiple tables in a single call. Requires projectId. Supports optional schedule expressions (ISO-8601 durations). Preferred over repeated peaka_create_cache calls.

tools.name: peaka_get_cache_statuses
tools.description: Get all cache statuses for tables in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Returns the current caching state, execution history, and progress for each cached table.

tools.name: peaka_refresh_cache_full
tools.description: Trigger a full refresh on an existing cache. Requires projectId. Use the cacheId from peaka_get_cache_statuses.

tools.name: peaka_refresh_cache_incremental
tools.description: Trigger an incremental update on an existing cache, fetching only new or changed rows. Requires projectId. Use the cacheId from peaka_get_cache_statuses.

tools.name: peaka_update_cache
tools.description: Update cache schedule settings on an existing cache. Requires projectId. Replaces both incremental and full-refresh schedules entirely each call.

tools.name: peaka_delete_cache
tools.description: Delete an existing cache; the underlying table is not affected. Requires projectId. Use the cacheId from peaka_get_cache_statuses.

tools.name: peaka_list_catalogs
tools.description: List all available catalogs in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Returns catalog names, types, and connection info.

tools.name: peaka_list_schemas
tools.description: List all available schemas for a given catalog in a Peaka project. Requires projectId.

tools.name: peaka_list_tables
tools.description: List all available tables for a given catalog and schema in a Peaka project. Requires projectId.

tools.name: peaka_list_columns
tools.description: List all columns for a given table in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Returns column names, data types, and constraints. Use peaka_get_project_metadata first to discover available catalogs, schemas, and tables.

tools.name: peaka_get_relations
tools.description: Get table relationships (foreign keys) for a catalog. Requires projectId. Useful for constructing accurate JOINs.

tools.name: peaka_get_table_statistics
tools.description: Get column-level statistics for a table, including distinct-value fractions. Requires projectId. Useful for cardinality estimation and query optimization.

tools.name: peaka_list_connections
tools.description: List all data source connections in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. Returns each connection's id, name, and type.

tools.name: peaka_get_connection_detail
tools.description: Get connection-specific configuration detail for a data source. Requires projectId. Use peaka_list_connections to discover connection IDs.

tools.name: peaka_create_semantic_catalog
tools.description: Create a semantic catalog in a Peaka project. Requires projectId. A semantic catalog groups semantic tables (saved queries surfaced as queryable tables) under a single namespace. Returns the created catalog including its id.

tools.name: peaka_create_semantic_table
tools.description: Create a semantic table inside a semantic catalog, backed by a saved query. Requires projectId, catalogId, schemaName, tableName, and queryId. Use peaka_create_query (or peaka_list_queries) to obtain the queryId.

tools.name: peaka_delete_semantic_table
tools.description: Delete a semantic table from a semantic catalog. Requires projectId, catalogId, and tableId. The underlying saved query is not affected.

tools.name: peaka_refresh_project_metadata
tools.description: Refresh project metadata for a specific catalog. Requires projectId. Use when a data source has structurally changed (e.g. new tables or columns added). This is a long-running operation that polls until completion.

tools.name: peaka_get_metadata_refresh_status
tools.description: Check the current status of a metadata refresh job for a specific catalog. Requires projectId.
